artifacts.detail: package gate; not an equal deck battle gate

top_decks.objective: Strategy-first miracle spellslinger control/combo shell that preserves the active core while tuning lands and package balance.
Miracle spellslinger shell that uses topdeck setup and hand filtering to turn Lorehold's commander text into discounted spell chains.
Big-spells shell that leans on Lorehold's miracle discount to cast expensive effects ahead of curve.
Spell-copy control shell that tries to trade resources, protect a window, then convert copied spells into a win.
Lifegain/storm shell that tries to convert repeated spell casts into life-buffered combo finishers.
